hero.body: Agency CRM connects your pipeline, contracts, projects, and billing — so you spend less time on admin and more time on results.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card required · 14-day free trial

features.heading: Everything your agency needs
features.subheading: One platform for every stage of client work — from the first ad click to the final payment.

leadPipeline.title: Lead Pipeline
leadPipeline.description: Capture leads from Meta, Google, and TikTok ads automatically. Move prospects through your sales funnel with a visual Kanban board.

proposals.title: Proposals & Contracts
proposals.description: Send branded offers and get contracts signed digitally — no third-party tools needed. Track every status from draft to signed.

billing.title: Invoice & Billing
billing.description: Generate invoices from contracts in one click. Automated monthly billing, partial payments, and overdue reminders built in.

analytics.title: ROI Analytics
analytics.description: Connect ad accounts and track spend, ROAS, CPL, and conversion rates per project. Real data — no spreadsheets.

projects.title: Project Management
projects.description: Track deliverables, log time, and manage your team across every client engagement with Gantt charts and task boards.

automation.title: Automation Engine
automation.description: Schedule recurring billing, sync ad metrics, and send reminders automatically. Focus on work, not admin.

cta.heading: Ready to run a tighter agency?
cta.body: Join agencies who manage every client from lead to invoice in one system.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Agency CRM. Precision growth for digital agencies.
